name: AI Weekly Briefing
description: Search latest AI news, organize by categories, and generate a beautifully designed H5 web page briefing
author: Jackie Zhan

inputs.name: audience
inputs.description: Target audience (e.g., sales team, management, clients)

inputs.name: focus_area
inputs.description: Industry focus area (e.g., general AI, education AI, finance AI)

outputs.name: html_file
outputs.description: Path to the generated H5 briefing HTML file
